body:
# Mia Taylor

**Role:** Research Fellow

[Mia Taylor](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mia-taylor-74b593219/) joined Forethought after three years as a Researcher and then Interim Research Director at the [Center on Long-term Risk](https://longtermrisk.org/). She received a bachelor’s degree in Mathematics and Computer Science from Harvey Mudd College.
text: Mia Taylor Role: Research Fellow Mia Taylor joined Forethought after three years as a Researcher and then Interim Research Director at the Center on Long-term Risk. She received a bachelor’s degree in Mathematics and Computer Science from Harvey Mudd College.
